response.justification: Bogdan has strong software engineering fundamentals and relevant experience in backend systems, distributed architectures, and event-driven platforms, but lacks direct experience with agentic AI systems in production or fintech infrastructure. His recent roles show leadership and scalability, but not in the specific AI agent or fintech domains required. The resume lacks detail on AI/ML systems, regulatory compliance, or financial domain expertise, which are critical for this role.
strengths: Strong backend and distributed systems expertise with event-driven architectures (e.g., GISCollective, Optilyz)
Proven leadership in scaling engineering teams and implementing disciplined software practices (CI/CD, TDD)
Experience with real-time systems and low-latency applications (e.g., Dunnhumby, re:cinq)
concerns: No demonstrated experience building or operating multi-agent AI systems in production environments
Limited evidence of fintech infrastructure expertise (e.g., credit risk, payment flows, regulatory compliance)
No direct experience with agentic AI frameworks (e.g., LangGraph) or LLM integration in commercial settings
